Bash(wsl -- bash -c "source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 22 && node --version && npm install -g openclaw && openclaw --version")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); skills=d[''skills'']; print\(f''Total: {len\(skills\)}''\); ready=[s for s in skills if s.get\(''eligible''\)]; print\(f''Ready: {len\(ready\)}''\); print\(''Ready skills:''\); [print\(f'' {s[""name""]} - {s.get\(""emoji"",""""\)}''\) for s in ready]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) skills=d[''skills''] print\(f''Total skills: {len\(skills\)}''\) for s in skills: status=''READY'' if s.get\(''eligible''\) else ''MISSING'' missing_info = '''' if not s.get\(''eligible''\) and s.get\(''missing''\): m = s[''missing''] parts = [] if m.get\(''bins''\): parts.append\(f''bins:{m[""bins""]}''\) if m.get\(''env''\): parts.append\(f''env:{m[""env""]}''\) if m.get\(''os''\): parts.append\(f''os_only:{m[""os""]}''\) missing_info = '' | '' + '', ''.join\(parts\) print\(f'' [{status}] {s[""name""]} {s.get\(""emoji"",""""\)}{missing_info}''\) ")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const p=process.env.USERPROFILE+''/.openclaw/openclaw.json''; try { const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(p,''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\); }")
